flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Interactive College of Technology-Chamblee fell 26% between 2021 and 2024 (702 → 521).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 16 pp at Interactive College of Technology-Chamblee vs the 2003–2007 baseline (39.1% vs 55.1%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Interactive College of Technology-Chamblee rose 10% between 2017 and 2020 ($9.6k → $10.6k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Interactive College of Technology-Chamblee fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.2% → 0.0%).
